data.body: Manually executed epic 5fd2's converged 3-pass plan-review on config-epic 7c02 + its 5 children. Adapted run_review_foundation/children harnesses -> run_review_configepic.py + run_review_configchildren.py (v8 rubric; Pass-1 Opus, Pass-2 aggregate/agentic Sonnet, Pass-3 gate). RESULT: GATE PASS at every level — no block decisions (epic: 10 advisory/7 dropped/12 indeterminate; children all advisory/indeterminate/dropped). DET floor passed on all 6 tickets. Folded high-confidence advisories back into tickets: docs AC7 (README+architecture.md)->14b8; orphan/no-auto-migrate AC->epic; dir-shape+validator rejection tests & custom-branch e2e->5436; preserve reads.py work-tree validation contract->8f43; removal-not-just-replacement->3e28. Verified the conf=0.71 'advisory_lock.py missing' finding was a false positive. Verdicts commented on all 6 tickets.
